factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a realistic use moment.
The MagSafe feature is visually clear, indicating a specific benefit.
The arrangement of the product and background elements is clear and easy to follow.
The texture and details of the case are visible, showcasing material quality.
The Apple logo provides a strong brand trust signal.
The contrast between the product and background is strong, making it easily readable.
The image has a clear campaign intent with a lifestyle presentation.
